name: Vegetable Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your cooked vegetables (green beans, wax beans, carrots, summer squash, or even turnips).
2. Drain the vegetables.
3. Make a batter by mixing egg, milk, oil, flour, and salt in a bowl. Use 1 cup of milk for a thinner batter if desired.
4. Dip the vegetables into the batter.
5. Fry the vegetables in hot fat until lightly browned, about 3 minutes.
6. Drain excess fat and serve.
